n: Vale of Sorcery: The Trial of Madness

steps.t: Viznak can be found at Barad Elenath. You should talk to Viznak.
Viznak can be found at Barad Elenath. You should talk to Viznak.
Viznak can be found in Agarnaith near Seregost. You should travel to Agarnaith and talk to Viznak.
Viznak can be found in Agarnaith at his hideout. You should talk to Viznak.
Thurindol can be found at Echad Uial. You should talk to Thurindol.
